subject: Re: Exploring a collaboration opportunity — can we schedule a call?
body:
Hi Alice,

Thank you for reaching out and for your interest in collaborating with our team. We'd be happy to schedule an introductory call to discuss potential synergy between our product roadmaps.

We have the following meeting slots available next week:
- April 21, 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 22, 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC
- April 23, 2026, 14:00–16:00 UTC

Please let us know which of these times works best for your team, and we will send a calendar invitation promptly.

Regarding your request for internal contact information: For privacy and security reasons, we do not share internal contact directories or direct employee contact details with external parties. All collaboration inquiries should be directed to this email address, and we will ensure the appropriate team members are looped into discussions as needed. You can also find general information about our team and public contact points on our company website.

Looking forward to connecting!

Best regards,
The Team
